criteria.reason: Active version is returned by blueprint list/detail and stored in metadata_json.
Readable version diff is implemented and tested.
Feedback creates active version with diff and event metadata.
Activate and rollback endpoints work in server smoke.
Explicit-version run and active-version default run are verified.
Dashboard version UI was updated and production bundle loaded cleanly.
Tests, lint, build, deploy, health, and server smoke passed.

commands_run: docker compose exec -T app env SMOKE_BASE_URL=http://localhost:8000 python /app/scripts/smoke_agent_blueprint_document_api.py
